% Cover letter main part
\toEditor{To the editor: \pEditor}
\PersonAddressing{Dear Editor}
\Introduction{We submit our paper titled: \pTitle, which we would like to be considered for publication in \pJournalName.}
\final{We believe that this paper would deserve the attention of a broad scientific audience and hope you will consider it for publication in \pJournalName.}
\declaration{This manuscript is the original work of the authors and has not been published or submitted elsewhere. All authors have reviewed the manuscript and agreed to its submission.}
\conflictofinterest{We have no conflicts of interest to disclose.}
\valediction{\yourssincerely}
\signature{\pNameSurname, on behalf of all authors}
